Cashflow Academy
Cashflow Academy

Build A Cashflowing Portfolio In 12 Months — Without Becoming A Full‑Time Underwriter

A 12‑month, hands‑on program for accredited investors deploying $50K–$1M+ into private alternative investments using a proven three‑step process.

90
Day Deployment
Framework
1:1
Deal Reviews
With Pascal
Weekly
Live Office Hours
& Q&A
Book Your Deployment Gameplan Call →
Spots are limited and filled on a first‑come, first‑served basis.
Trusted By Executives Of
Lufthansa• Techstars• Deloitte• General Motors
You’re surrounded by opportunities, but:
✕No real plan — just scattered decks, podcasts, and pitch calls
✕No clear Buy Box — no simple way to say “this fits what I’m building” vs “this is noise”
✕No reps with one checklist — so every $50K decision feels like a brand‑new leap of faith
The #1 reason most people never build passive income isn’t lack of capital or opportunity. It’s lack of confidence — to commit to the right investments, and walk away from the wrong ones.
Without Academy
Cash flow projections locked
Risk analysis blurred
No GP introductions
No peer comparisons
Guessing on every wire
With Academy
Full cash flow & return projections
Complete risk analysis on every deal
Direct GP intros & data room access
Peer benchmarks vs 400+ deals
Confident invest‑or‑pass decisions
In Cashflow Academy, You’ll Learn How To…
Find and evaluate operators you can actually trust
Stop relying on gut feelings, referrals, or how good their webinar felt.
Use a simple checklist to break down any private deal in minutes, not days
Whether it’s a fund or a syndication, you’ll know exactly what to look at first.
Design an allocation that matches your goals: income, growth, and tax efficiency
So every deal you say “yes” to has a clear job in your portfolio.
+ Show 4 more skills you’ll build
Decide how much capital you really need to hit your numbers
E.g. $10K, $20K, $30K+/month in passive income or a specific W‑2 tax reduction target.
Compare funds and syndications apples‑to‑apples
Quickly see which ones fit your Buy Box and which ones are a hard no.
Understand what “normal” fees, terms, and structures look like
And when those details quietly tilt the deal against you.
Build a decision process you actually trust
So you’re not second‑guessing every wire or stuck in analysis paralysis for months.

Plus, the Tools to Execute
Buy Box Builder
Define what’s in, what’s out, and what’s “maybe” — so you filter deals fast and only spend time on what fits.
Deal Research Checklist
Run key questions and numbers through a structured checklist to vet operators, structures, and financials before you wire.
Asset Allocation Worksheet
See exactly where your money is today and how to rebalance across income, growth, and tax/depreciation buckets.
800+ Deal Database
Browse real investment opportunities, compare deals side‑by‑side, and apply your Buy Box in real time.
Bonus #1
1:1 Deal Evaluation Session
A 90‑minute session where Pascal walks through a deal you’re considering. Good for up to 12 months after you join.
Bonus #2
Ultimate Tax Prep Checklist
Organize and manage your K‑1s, distributions, and entity docs so tax season is painless.
Your First 90 Days
Your first 90 days are about getting real reps, not binging theory.
1
Get Oriented & Set Targets
Clarify where you are now vs. where you want to be. Review your current portfolio and honest risk tolerance.
Outcome: You know exactly where you’re starting from and what we’re aiming at.
2
Build Your Buy Box
Decide what’s in, what’s out, and what’s “maybe.” Start applying that filter to real deals.
Outcome: A written framework you can use to quickly eliminate bad fits.
3
Compare Real Deals
Compare investments against your Buy Box. Spot marketing hype vs. real risk‑adjusted returns.
Outcome: You know how to break down a deal and recognize red flags.
4
Run a Deal End‑to‑End
Pick a live deal. Use the Deal Research Checklist. Vet the operator. Make a clear invest‑or‑pass decision.
Outcome: At least one real deal taken from “interesting” to a clear decision.
5
Turn It Into a Habit
This stops being “a course you took” and becomes how you invest: a simple, repeatable process.
Outcome: A repeatable habit supported by a room of other serious LPs.
Designed For Busy People (Not Full‑Time Analysts)
Short, focused calls
Office hours are practical working sessions, not 90‑minute lectures. You come with deals and leave with answers.
Real‑world reps, not busywork
The “assignments” are things you needed to do anyway: sharpen your Buy Box, evaluate live deals, talk to operators.
Leverage from the room
You learn just as much watching other members’ deals get picked apart as you do from your own.
Hi, I’m Pascal Wagner.
In 2021, my dad passed away, leaving my mom an inheritance but no source of consistent income. Over six months, I spent $50,000+ attending masterminds and investor dinners to find investments that provided monthly cashflow. She’s currently receiving $10,000+ in 100% passive income each month.

Once I felt confident, I moved the majority of my net worth into passive investments as well — earning over $250,000 a year in passive income. Today, I help other accredited investors do the same thing, but with far less confusion and trial‑and‑error.
Who Cashflow Academy Is For
💼
Busy W‑2 Professionals
The paycheck is good but the trade‑off is your time. You want to build wealth without being chained to a desk forever.
🏠
Active Investors Ready to Go Passive
You got into real estate for freedom but ended up managing tenants. Ready to shift from active to truly passive.
🚀
Post‑Liquidity Event
You’ve exited a business or had a big bonus. You don’t want to park money in index funds and hope for the best.
25+ Success Stories & Counting
Busy W‑2 professionals, operators, and founders who were sitting on cash, circling deals, and finally pulled the trigger.

Book Your Deployment Gameplan Call →
90‑Day Decision Confidence Guarantee
30‑Day Fit Guarantee: Attend your Gameplan Call and first two office hours. If it’s not the right fit, get a full refund — no questions asked.
90‑Day Confidence Guarantee: Complete your Buy Box, evaluate 3 deals, and attend 6+ sessions. If you don’t feel decisively more confident, Pascal will personally extend your membership.
The Real Cost of Waiting
At 5% inflation, $1M in idle capital loses roughly $50,000/year in purchasing power — about $137 per day. If you could reasonably earn 10% in solid alternatives, that same $1M could generate $100,000/year in returns. Together, that’s roughly $150,000 of annual drag — the combined hit of inflation and missed opportunity.
Frequently Asked Questions
How much time do I need each week?
Most members spend 1–3 hours per week: ~60 minutes for office hours and ~60–90 minutes applying the checklist to real deals or refining their Buy Box.
Do you tell me which deals to invest in?
No. I show you how to evaluate operators, structures, and risk. You always make your own decisions — with a lot more clarity and a lot less anxiety.
Is this only for real estate?
No. We cover real estate funds and syndications, private credit / debt funds, and oil & gas. The system works across asset classes.
I’ve already done a few deals. Is this still for me?
Yes. Most members have done something before joining. The common pattern: “I’ve done some deals, but I don’t have a system.”
What happens after 12 months?
Continue as an Alumni member at ~$197/month with ongoing office hours, Deal Flow access, and new tools. Only available to current members.
What if I can’t attend office hours live?
Every session is recorded. Submit questions or deals ahead of time, then watch the replay on your own schedule.
How many people are in the program?
This isn’t a 500-person webinar. Office hours are intentionally kept small so you can bring deals, get direct feedback, and actually know who else is in the room.
For accredited investors only. You earn $200K+/yr (or $300K+ combined) or have $1M+ net worth excluding your primary residence. The deals we work through are legally limited to accredited investors.

Core Platform
✓ Supabase auth (email+password, JWT, auto-refresh)
✓ Sign Up → Supabase user + GHL contact + tier tags

✓ Live deals from 21 Supabase tables
✓ Deal filtering, search, grid/list views
✓ Deal detail with fee benchmarks + social proof
✓ Buy Box wizard → Supabase + GHL sync
✓ Deal pipeline (interested → DD → invested → passed)
✓ DD checklist (10-item, realtime sync)
✓ Deal Q&A system

Data & Intelligence
✓ 730K+ SEC Form D filings (full market data)
✓ Market Intel with 3 tabs (SEC / Deal Insights / Stats)
✓ AI deal enrichment via Claude (deck/PPM extraction)
✓ Background checks (SEC, FINRA, OFAC, courts)
✓ Operator directory with profiles + track records

Admin & Growth

Known Issues
✗ GHL → Supabase sync is login-only (admin changes don’t pull until user logs in)
✗ Magic link / forgot password not built
✗ Weekly digest email kill-switched (needs Supabase migration)
✗ Mobile swipe feed is beta — some layout quirks on smaller screens
✗ Analytics data stored in localStorage (not persistent across browsers)

Full Airtable → Supabase migration completed. Zero Airtable dependencies remain. Make.com still used for GDrive → enrichment pipeline. Deck/PPM files in Supabase Storage (signed URLs, 1-year expiry).
Moat Thesis
The moat is the people, not the software.
Every intro made, every DD checklist completed, every buy box configured creates proprietary data a competitor can’t replicate. The network compounds — more LPs attract more GPs, which attract more LPs.
Total Intros

Network Flywheel
More
LPs
→
More
Intros
→
GPs Get
Warm Leads
→
GPs List
More Deals
→
More LPs
Join
→
AI Agents
Find Us
1 LP Network Lock-In
More LPs means more intro requests. GPs get warm leads for free, so they list more deals, which attracts more LPs. The cycle compounds.
TRACK: LP signups, active users, intros/month
2 GP Recruitment via Data
Show GPs: “We made X intros that led to $Y in capital deployed.” Prove value with attribution data, then onboard them.
TRACK: capital attributed, GP conversion rate
3 Data Moat
Every deal reviewed, DD checklist completed, and buy box configured creates proprietary data. A competitor would need to replicate the database AND the community.
TRACK: deals in DB, DD completions, buy box profiles
4 Academy as Trust Engine
Academy members get intros, deal access, DD tools. Non-members see deals but can’t act. Upsell: free browse → consultation → Academy → Fund LP.
TRACK: free-to-paid conversion, Academy retention
5 AI Agent Distribution
When AI agents search for deals, they hit our API. Free tier gets basic listings; paid API ($0.10-1.00/query) unlocks enriched data, DD reports, and sponsor analytics. Every query trains our models and deepens the data moat.
TRACK: API calls/day, unique agent keys, revenue per query
6 Proprietary Intelligence Layer
AI can scrape public data, but can’t replicate our DD checklists, LP sentiment, intro outcomes, or fund performance data. The more users interact, the more unique intelligence accumulates that no web scraper can access.
TRACK: DD completions, sentiment signals, performance data points

Intro & Attribution
Placement Agent
Transaction Layer
Secondary Market
Phase 1 Intro & Attribution IN PROGRESS
What
Facilitate LP-to-GP introductions. Track which intros lead to investments. Build attribution data to prove platform value.
Revenue
None directly. Building the data foundation that unlocks Phase 2.
Checklist
✓ “Request Introduction” button on deal pages
✓ Track intro requests (analytics events)
☐ Follow-up: ask LP “did you invest?”
☐ Attribution dashboard (intros → meetings → $)
☐ GP report: “GYC sent you X qualified LPs”
Phase 2 Placement Agent 6-12 MONTHS
What
Become a registered placement agent. Take a fee for capital raised through the platform.
Revenue
1-2% placement fee on capital deployed via GYC intros. $500K-2M/yr potential.
Checklist
☐ Legal: BD registration / RIA considerations
☐ GP agreements: formal placement terms
☐ “Invest Now” button + commitment tracking
☐ Capital pipeline (soft circle → funded)
☐ Automated LP accreditation verification
Phase 3 Transaction Layer 12-24 MONTHS
What
Facilitate actual money movement. Payment processing, subscription docs, capital calls, distributions.
Revenue
Transaction fees + platform fees on every dollar raised. $1-5M/yr potential.
Checklist
☐ Digital subscription agreements (e-sign)
☐ ACH / wire payment facilitation
☐ Capital call management for GPs
☐ Distribution tracking & reporting
☐ K-1 document distribution
Phase 4 Secondary Market & Tokenization 24+ MONTHS
What
Enable LP-to-LP secondary trades. Potentially tokenize LP interests on-chain for liquidity.
Revenue
Transaction fees on secondary trades + liquidity premium. $5-20M/yr potential.
Checklist
☐ Secondary marketplace for LP interests
☐ Price discovery (NAV, auction, negotiated)
☐ ROFR workflow for GPs
☐ ERC-1400 security token tokenization
☐ ATS registration
